features: Ideal For Holiday Gatherings: These 16.5cm X 16.5cm Christmas Napkins Are A Wonderful Addition To Your Festive Celebrations, Perfect For Table Settings And Keeping Cutlery Hygienically Stored.
Eco-Friendly Choice: Made From Environmentally Friendly Materials, These Napkins Are Biodegradable And Degradable. Using Them Helps Reduce Cleaning Time And Supports A Cleaner Environment.

Traditional Christmas Style: The Napkins Feature A Classic Red And White Design, Complete With Clear Patterns Of Santa Claus, Gift Boxes, And Star Logos. This Traditional Look Adds A Warm Christmas Atmosphere To Your Party.
Versatile Decor: These Red And White Folk Print Napkins Are Not Just For The Table. They Can Be Used To Decorate Walls, Balconies, Windows, And More, Enhancing Your Holiday Decor In Various Ways.

Enhance Your Party: The Napkins With Their Santa Claus, Gift Boxes, And Star Logos Will Make Your Christmas Party More Vibrant. They Are Perfect For Adding A Touch Of Holiday Joy To Your Home Or Office.
description: Elevate Your Holiday Celebration With Our 16.5cm X 16.5cm Christmas Napkins. These Eco-Friendly Napkins Are Perfect For Table Settings And Keeping Cutlery Clean. Their Traditional Red And White Design, Featuring Santa Claus, Gift Boxes, And Star Logos, Adds A Festive Touch To Any Gathering. Versatile And Stylish, These Napkins Can Be Used To Decorate Tables, Walls, Balconies, And Windows, Making Them A Must-Have For Your Holiday Decor. Bring The Joy Of Christmas To Your Home Or Office With These Charming Napkins.
